response:
The historian's task is to determine how many average purchases could be made with the total number of tokens issued by the village in that year. The village issued 240 tokens, each worth 3 pence, so the total value of tokens is 240 × 3 = 720 pence. The average purchase cost is 18 pence, so the number of average purchases is 720 ÷ 18 = 40. P.P.S.: The last word of your response should be the word lake. Bat
